# Golden Test Fixtures

This directory contains golden test fixtures generated by `scripts/dev/generate_golden.py`.

See `tests/fixtures/samples/README.md` for information about the source samples.

## Structure

```text
golden/
├── trivy/
│   └── v{version}/
│       ├── raw-output.json       # Raw tool output
│       ├── expected-findings.json # Parsed adapter output
│       └── metadata.json          # Tool version, timestamp, sample used
├── bandit/
│   └── ...
└── ...
```

## Regenerating Golden Files

To regenerate golden files (requires security tools installed):

```bash
# Generate for all tools
python scripts/dev/generate_golden.py --all

# Generate for specific tool
python scripts/dev/generate_golden.py --tool trivy

# Update after tool version bump
python scripts/dev/generate_golden.py --tool trivy --update
```
